Name: ComfortDelGro Taxi
Description:
Following the merger of two successful listed transport companies – Comfort Group and Delgro Corporation in 2003, Comfort Transportation and CityCab became members of the ComfortDelGro Group.

ComfortDelGro Taxi, as it's known today, is a leading taxi company in Singapore. With about a 10,000-strong environmentally friendly taxi fleet, we operate point-to-point taxi services 24/7.

One of our key B2B products is Cabcharge - a convenient and customisable charge account system that has been pioneered in Singapore since 1995 - the preferred cashless payment mode for ComfortDelGro taxi fares. All payment transactions are seamlessly collated and detailed digitally on statements which are easily accessible via a secure online user portal. This enables companies to better establish business travel policies as well as manage, track and audit travel expenditure of its employees, resulting in cost efficiencies and greater accountability. 

Cabcharge has a dedicated team of Account Managers to serve the needs of clients from all industries and company sizes. We are able to tailor-made our service solutions to augment any company’s organisation framework and expenditure policies. Cabcharge also continuously innovates and invests in the latest mobile digital and data security technologies to deliver incremental savings and benefits to clients. 

Contact us today at 6550 8746 or via email at sales@cdgtaxi.com.sg to arrange for an obligation-free consultation with one of our Account Managers.

To learn more about ComfortDelGro Taxi and Cabcharge, visit us at www.cdgtaxi.com.sg. Interested individuals and companies are welcome to apply for a Cabcharge account by downloading and completing the online application form, before submitting it to us via email. 

We look forward serve you and your company's transport needs.

Name: RodBez
Description:
RodBez, an innovative startup has been making waves in the transportation sector of Bihar, India. Launched in June 2022, RodBez aims to revolutionize the way people travel by offering a one-way taxi and taxi pool platform, connecting rural and urban areas.

One of the key features of RodBez is its mission to address the challenges posed by unorganised taxi services in the state. By providing a seamless and efficient taxi service, RodBez aims to reduce the cost of travel by up to 40 percent and eliminate the need for both-side fares, which is a common practice in other taxi services. This approach not only makes commuting more affordable but also significantly reduces the environmental impact of travel by optimizing the use of transportation resources.

The success of RodBez can be attributed to its strong team of professionals, including Co-founder Siddharth Shankar Jha, and the support of investors like Ritesh Agarwal, the Founder and CEO of OYO Rooms, Vineeta Singh Co-founder of Sugar Cosmetics. The startup has gained recognition for its disruptive potential, as demonstrated by its appearance on "Shark Tank India S3," where it secured a deal of Rs 50 lakh.
In summary, RodBez, under the leadership of Dilkhush Kumar, has emerged as a game-changer in the transportation sector of Bihar. With its innovative approach to taxi services, the startup is not only revolutionizing the way people travel but also providing employment opportunities to a diverse range of professionals. RodBez's success serves as an inspiring example of how determination and hard work can transform a simple idea into a thriving business that positively impacts the community.

Name: DG Group
Description:
2026 Private Hire Company Of The Year.

Journey by journey, we're changing the way we move.
Imagine a greener, cleaner environment bringing transport, services, and people closer.
Our technology joins communities and it’s all driven by you.

DG Private Hire has been trading for over 35 years and is one of the most established companies in the East Midlands, run as a family business our growth from 12 to over 550 vehicles prides its self on customer care and reliability.

Having started the company from a porter cabin on a garage forecourt the late Mr Don Greenwood (DG)  and Mr Lance Hun moved the business to offices in the local area of Sherwood were we remained for over 30 years. Passing on the family run business, Mr Eric Atkinson further developed the company to become one of Nottingham’s leading firms before retiring and the Javaid family made the acquisition of DG Cars in 2001. For the last 10 years Amjid Javaid together with his brothers and son have invested in the company and seen the fleet grow to its present day size. In 2009 the main core of the business moved to its present day premises in Colwick and a purposed designed call centre accommodating over 70 full and part-time staff was opened while keeping offices in Sherwood and the City Centre of Nottingham, formally the Fon a Car company which was purchased in 2008. The management team including Mr Ian Pole, who started with the company in 1983 have over 80 years experience delivering customer service, backed by their valued call centre team we offer the highest level of service whether a premier account customer or an everyday user. 

The company also prides itself on environmental issues having just been awarded the ISO 14001 adding to the SIO 9001 which was achieved 2 years ago. As a company we will continue to focus on the Carbon issues and target further reductions by another 20% in 2015.

Name: Chariots for Hire
Description:
Nearly a decade ago a small group of six friends pooled their money and bought a 10 passenger black limousine. With the belief that a side transportation business would be popular amongst friends for weddings, nights out on the town or sporting events, the young entrepreneurs began renting and driving the limo, soon realizing they had hit a niche that was thirsty for competition.

Over the past decade, Chariots For Hire became a recognized leader in transportation and an icon for those interested in Washington DC’s nightlife and Washington DC tours. Their fleet of chariots comprises one of the Nation’s largest and most diverse. In 2009 Chariots For Hire chauffeured the highest number of wine lovers to dozens of local Virginia wineries. Thorough training of all trip advisers, dispatch managers and over 150 certified and licensed chauffeurs, ensures that each ride with Chariots becomes a superb experience.

Thousands of trips to the airport and hundreds of wine tours and weddings later, Chariots For Hire continues to grow and expand its services. Beyond a political legacy, Washington, D.C. has become a global destination for tourism, international business, culture and entertainment. Chariots For Hire possesses unique familiarity with the pace of Washington and continues to expand its services and vehicles to suit the expectations of its guests.

Whether you’ve heard their memorable name or seen the famed Charioteer pull up beside you, Chariots For Hire remains ready to guide you through an unforgettable experience of Washington!

Name: Sable Ride
Description:
Born in the silence of 2020, Sable Ride was created not out of convenience, but necessity. While much of the world pressed pause during the pandemic, we pressed forward offering safe, reliable, and luxurious black car services to essential travelers when they needed it most.

From our first rides in the Tri-State area to becoming a trusted nationwide name, our mission has remained the same: deliver luxury that feels effortless, safety that feels personal, and service that never cuts corners.

We built our reputation on discipline, empathy, and attention to detail; vehicles immaculately maintained, chauffeurs professionally trained, and every ride backed by strict safety protocols. What began as a response to crisis has evolved into a gold standard for premium, human-first transportation.

Today, Sable Ride proudly serves major cities, airports, and cross-state routes across the U.S., powered by innovative booking technology, real-time updates, and dedicated customer care. Our fleet is designed to meet every occasion, including:

-> Luxury Sedans – Elegant comfort for business or personal travel

-> Premium SUVs – Spacious and secure for families or VIP groups

-> Stretch Limousines – Perfect for weddings, proms, and celebrations

-> Sprinter Vans – Stylish group transport with premium amenities

At Sable Ride, every mile is more than transportation; it’s trust earned, expectations exceeded, and experiences elevated. Whether you’re traveling for business, celebrating a milestone, or simply needing a stress-free airport transfer, we bring resilience, reliability, and refined comfort to every journey.

Sable Ride, created in crisis. Crafted for the future. Committed to you.

Name: Associated Taxis
Description:
Associated Taxis was established in 1995 and operates from public and private offices situated in Bishop’s Stortford adjacent to London Stansted Airport. Taxi services are provided locally and nationally for journeys commencing or ending in Bishop’s Stortford, Stansted Airport and/or all surrounding areas.
I
All drivers and vehicles are fully licensed. With over 80 drivers Associated Taxis is the largest licensed taxi and private hire operator in Bishop’s Stortford (also serving Stansted Airport and all surrounding areas).

All staff and drivers are committed to providing the highest possible standard of service and have all either completed, or are in course of completing, a Passenger Transport NVQ.

Safety and operating efficiency are enhanced by the application of the very latest technology. Associated Taxis use fully automated booking and dispatch systems operating from the world’s leading GPC Autocab “Ghost” cloud platform. Cloud based GPC Autocab “Phantom” phone systems provide additional support and service in the form of Caller Line ID (all calls are recorded) and interactive Voice response (IVR) facilities. All vehicles and drivers are tracked and linked to the control room by data streaming and GPRS. A dedicated Associated APP is available to download free from Android and Apple stores offering all customers the opportunity to book directly.

Associated Taxis works closely with: a broad range of local, district, county and national government agencies and bodies; a broad range of local, national and multi-national corporations; most bars, clubs, restaurants, guest houses and hotels; most traders, professionals, shops and stores to ensure the safe carriage of their customers.

 Oficjalny, licencjonowany partner Uber, Bolt i FreeNow
 Legalne zatrudnienie

 Własna flota samochodów + auta partnerskie
 Pomoc dla obcokrajowców – legalizacja, dokumenty, wsparcie w języku ojczystym
 Biuro w Warszawie – ul. Barkocińska 6, dzielnica Targówek
 Działamy w całej Polsce – zdalna rekrutacja i obsługa dokumentów
 Zespół doradców i konsultantów, którz

Nasze główne obszary działalności to:
 Zatrudnianie kierowców do pracy w taxi – Rekrutujemy, szkolimy i wspieramy kierowców aplikacyjnych (Uber, Bolt, FreeNow) w szybkim i legalnym rozpoczęciu pracy.

 Wsparcie dla kierowców z zagranicy
Pomagamy cudzoziemcom w kompleksowym przygotowaniu do pracy w branży taxi:

 Legalizacja pobytu i pracy – Kompleksowa pomoc w uzyskaniu zezwoleń, kart pobytu i oświadczeń o powierzeniu pracy.

 Wymiana prawa jazdy – Wsparcie w procesie wymiany zagranicznego prawa jazdy na polskie, zgodnie z obowiązującymi przepisami.

 Wynajem samochodów – szukamy najlepszych aut dla twojej pracy w taxi.

 Leasing pojazdów – Oferujemy elastyczne formy finansowania pojazdów, dopasowane do potrzeb. Pomagamy wybrać najkorzystniejsze opcje i wspieramy cały proces formalny.

 Sprzedaż aut – Prowadzimy sprzedaż sprawdzonych, w pełni zweryfikowanych pojazdów. Gwarantujemy przejrzystość, bezpieczeństwo transakcji oraz fachowe doradztwo.

Name: Airport Taxi Kwinana City
Description:
Airport Taxi Kwinana City: Your Trusted Partner for Stress-Free Airport Transfers.

Navigating the complexities of air travel can be overwhelming, but with Airport Taxi Kwinana City, your journey to and from the airport is one less thing to worry about. We are committed to providing a seamless, comfortable, and reliable airport transfer service, ensuring that our clients experience a smooth transition between their home or hotel and the airport.

Why Choose Airport Taxi Kwinana City?

1. Punctuality and Reliability: We understand the importance of time, especially when it comes to catching a flight. Our drivers are always punctual, ensuring you arrive at the airport with plenty of time to spare. For arrivals, we track your flight to adjust our timing, so even if your flight is delayed, we’ll be there waiting.

2. Comfort and Safety: Our fleet of vehicles is meticulously maintained to offer the highest levels of comfort and safety. Whether you’re traveling alone, with family, or in a group, we have the perfect vehicle to suit your needs. From spacious sedans to larger maxi taxis, every ride is a luxurious experience.

3. Experienced Drivers: Our drivers are more than just chauffeurs—they are knowledgeable professionals who prioritize your safety and convenience. Familiar with the best routes in and around Kwinana, they ensure a smooth ride, avoiding traffic and getting you to your destination on time.

4. Easy Booking Process: Booking a ride with Airport Taxi Kwinana City is simple and convenient. Our online booking system is user-friendly, allowing you to schedule your transfer in just a few clicks. Whether you need a ride immediately or want to plan ahead, we’ve got you covered.

5. Affordable Pricing: We believe that premium service doesn’t have to come with a hefty price tag. Our rates are competitive and transparent, with no hidden fees. What you see is what you get—excellent service at a fair price.

Name: D & D Executive Transportation
Description:
D & D Executive Transportation was founded by Dave and Dawn Archer in October of 2008. The company started as a single sedan operation that exclusively did Farm-In work. In 2010, their son, Scott, came in to help run the daily operation, and to grow the business. In 2012, the company added their first limo, a Mercedes Sprinter Limo, which was one of the first in the state. By 2015, D & D had grown enough to require a building. It was decided that it was important to protect the vehicles from the elements as much as possible, so a large door was important.
Now that D & D has 8 vehicles, it is almost time for a larger building, and those talks are under way. Currently, there are three sedans, a stretch limo, a Mercedes Sprinter Limo, a Sprinter Shuttle, a twenty-two passenger Mini-Coach, and a Party Bus. A variety of chauffeur partners allow us to offer further sedan service, as well as SUV. Over the next few years there are a great number of plans that have been put in place, or that will be in place. Though the company does let the business decide the exact order of things, the building is the first priority, followed by a larger party bus. 
The possibilities are endless for what could happen in the future, and having the right staff is always important. Of course there is always a need for new Chauffeurs. D & D hopes to add Sales Representatives as well, these sales reps would be for Corporate, and also for nationwide Affiliate Sales. A Human Resources manager wouldn't be far behind, and of course there is always the chance of a mechanic at some point down the line.

Are you tired of the hassle associated with booking a taxi or auto rickshaw? Frustrated with exorbitant surge charges and unreliable service? Look no further because AUXI is here to revolutionize your transportation experience. With AUXI, you can expect hassle-free rides, zero surge charges, and unmatched reliability.

Why Choose AUXI?

Zero Surge Charges : One of the most frustrating aspects of traditional ride-hailing services is the unpredictable surge pricing during peak hours or bad weather. With AUXI, you can bid farewell to surge charges. We believe in transparency, and you'll pay only as per the metered fare, no matter when or where you need a ride.

High Reliability : We understand the importance of getting you to your destination on time. AUXI has redefined reliability in the transportation industry. Our extensive network of trained and experienced drivers ensures that a ride is never more than a few minutes away. Say goodbye to long waits and unreliable services.

Hassle-Free Booking : Booking a ride with AUXI is as easy as it gets. Our user-friendly app allows you to book a taxi or auto rickshaw with just a few taps. Whether you need a ride for your daily commute, a night out, or any other occasion, AUXI has you covered.

Safe and Secure : Your safety is our top priority. All AUXI drivers undergo rigorous background checks and training to ensure a safe and comfortable ride. Our in-app tracking feature allows you to share your trip details with loved ones for added security.

Transparent Fare Structure : AUXI is committed to fair and transparent pricing. You'll receive an upfront estimate of your fare, and there are no hidden costs. Pay securely through the app, with various payment options available for your convenience.

24/7 Customer Support : Our dedicated customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any queries or concerns. We're here to ensure your AUXI experience is smooth and enjoyable.

Name: UGO OUT
Description:
UgoOut is a leading mobile app revolutionizing the way people commute and businesses promote their services in the UK. This innovative platform provides users with free taxi services, all while supporting local businesses and creating a sustainable environment.

At UgoOut, we understand the importance of connecting users to their desired destinations conveniently and cost-effectively. With our app, users can request a taxi to take them to their chosen venue, whether it's a restaurant, bar, club, or any other entertainment spot. The best part? The taxi service is completely free when users meet the minimum spend requirement at the venue they visit.

This unique and mutually beneficial arrangement not only benefits the users but also helps businesses effectively market their services to their target demographics. Through the Analytics page on their personal web portal, businesses gain valuable insights into customer preferences and behaviors, enabling them to tailor their offerings and marketing strategies accordingly.

Our mission at UgoOut is to revive foot traffic on the high street, support local businesses, and promote environmentally sustainable transportation options. By incentivizing users to spend time at local venues, we contribute to the growth and vibrancy of communities while reducing reliance on personal vehicles.

Experience a convenient, eco-friendly, and rewarding way to explore the UK while supporting local businesses!

Description:
Spécialiste dans le domaine du transport de personnes, nous mettons à votre disposition un VTC Angers qui prendra en charge l’ensemble des déplacements à partir de la région angevine.

Notre prestation de transport est simple, efficace et claire.

Nous assurons une gamme de services de transport VTC Angers  variés et adaptatifs, selon vos envies.

De plus, nous réaliserons vos transfert vers l’Aéroport de Nantes-Atlantique ou Angers-Marcé et vos navettes vers la gare d’Angers Saint Laud.

Nos services sont disponibles 24h/24 et 7j/7, et pour toutes destinations et distances.
Vous êtes un professionnel ou un particulier et vous habitez les localités suivantes : Saint-Barthélémy d’Anjou, Trélazé, Le Plessis Grammoire, Saint Sylvain d’Anjou, Ecouflant Murs-Erigné, Brissac-Quincé ..Il est très important de choisir ce qui vous convient au mieux ! Avec VTC Angers, toutes les dispositions sont prises pour votre sécurité et votre transport en conciergerie tout le long de votre trajet. Y compris un chauffeur professionnel dynamique au volant et une voiture taxi Angers bien confortable . En effet, Angers VTC dispose d’un Taxi Angers bien assuré et en normes selon les règlements français en vigueur disposant d’une carte professionnelle. 

A la différence d’un Taxi Angers, un VTC Angers ne dispose pas d’enseigne lumineuse sur le toit du véhicule. Comme pour tous les VTC Angers, nos véhicules conduit par un chauffeur privé sont équipés d’un macaron rouge obligatoire sur le pare brise et la vitre arrière.

Nos véhicules, berline, van sont confortables, récentes et bien entretenues.

Nos tarifs sont transparents & fixes. Vous pouvez régler en espèces ou par carte bancaire simplement auprès de votre Chauffeur VTC lors de la fin de la course. Une facture pourra aussi vous être éditée sur simple demande auprès de votre chauffeur.

Avez-vous pensé à un VTC pour vos séminaires. Nous vous proposons des formules all-inclusives selon vos besoins, transfert aéroport-hôtel..

Name: Mountain Drop-offs
Description:
Mountain Drop-offs is ‘the’ Chamonix transfer specialist providing door-to-door transfer for visitors and residents 365 days a year. Operating longer than any other company in the valley it offers group shared, private and VIP transfers from Geneva Airport to resorts across the French and Swiss Alps.

Taking the stress out of travel arrangements is at the heart of Mountain Drop-offs customer driven approach. Its Chamonix-based English and French-speaking team builds its daily programme around customer flight arrival and departures times. 

Mountain Drop-offs’ guests can relax knowing that either a uniformed airport representative or driver will meet them for their group, private or VIP transfer. The team’s unrivaled attention to detail and monitoring of travel, flight and weather conditions guarantees the best possible transfer times from Geneva Airport to the Chamonix valley and a host of resorts including Avoriaz, Courcheval Les Arcs, La Tania, Megeve, Meribel, St Gervais, Tignes, Val d'Isere and Verbier – giving guests the peace of mind that they will never be left behind at the airport and return check-in times will be met.

The company operates a fleet of eight-seater minibuses for group and private transfers, offering its VIP option in a seven-seater Mercedes Viano.

Name: WomenFirst
Description:
WomenFirst started with a simple idea, born on the snowy streets of Grande Prairie. Our founder, expecting her fifth child, wanted something better, a safe, reliable ride service she’d trust for her own daughter. In those early days, she got behind the wheel herself, braving -30°C nights, ensuring hospital staff got home safely after shifts, and students had a secure way to end their nights out. Each ride reminded her that her community deserved a service built on safety, reliability, and trust.

From that single cab, WomenFirst has grown into a movement for safety and empowerment, dedicated to providing women across Alberta with a ride they can feel good about. Today, our platform serves women and families, backed by an incredible team of drivers who prioritize care, community, and trust.

Name: Minicabs.co.uk
Description:
At Minicabs we know that we offer the very best London minicab service – a claim that’s backed up by a huge number of our passengers, who consistently use us due to our promptness, politeness and great value for money.

We’ve been operating for a number of years now, and in this time we’ve honed our skills and business to create a great taxi company. What’s more, we’ve built up our number of taxis to ensure that we can cater to everyone’s needs, throughout the area we cover. We intend on improving in the future as well, by adding new facets to the Minicabs such as the fantastic app we have just introduced for Apple and Android users.

Our success is down to a few things that we regard to be extremely important, with the first of these being the fact that we always strive to offer the best value for money to all our passengers. This doesn’t just mean that we make sure our fares are kept as low as possible, but it also means that we go above and beyond what is expected. Of course, like any good taxi company, we always provide clean cars and friendly drivers, but unlike others we add a personal touch minicabs such as carrying your bags for you, making sure your children get to school, and generally helping in any way we can.

Another part of our success is the fact that we’re reliable. We know that trips to the airport or school runs can be stressful, so we endeavour to ensure that our drivers always get to you on time, so you aren’t left waiting around and worrying. In fact, we’ll often turn up early and wait, just to ensure that you don’t have to.

So, why not contact us today to find out how we can help you? You can call us on "0207 284 0000" or email us via "bookings@minicabs.co.uk" or alternatively you can use our app to book a taxi in seconds!

Name: TRIP RIVIERA
Description:
Trip Riviera est votre alternative haut de gamme aux taxis traditionnels, spécialisée dans le chauffeur privé VTC et le transport de luxe sur la Côte d’Azur. Basés à Antibes, nous assurons vos déplacements avec confort, ponctualité et discrétion, pour les particuliers comme pour les professionnels.

Nos services premium :
• Transferts privés : déplacements élégants vers Nice, Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez et toute la French Riviera.
• Transferts aéroport : accueil personnalisé et prise en charge rapide depuis/vers l’aéroport de Nice Côte d’Azur, Cannes-Mandelieu ou Monaco.
• Navette Antibes – aéroport : solution idéale pour vos voyages d’affaires ou vacances.
• Mise à disposition avec chauffeur : parfaite pour congrès, séminaires, mariages, tournages ou journées shopping.
• Visites guidées privées : découverte d’Antibes, Juan-les-Pins, du Cap d’Antibes et des villages emblématiques comme Èze ou Saint-Paul-de-Vence.
• Conciergerie de luxe : réservation de restaurants gastronomiques, accès VIP à des événements et organisation d’expériences exclusives.

Notre flotte se compose de véhicules premium (Mercedes, Lexus, Tesla…) pour un confort optimal. Nos chauffeurs expérimentés connaissent parfaitement la région et assurent un service irréprochable, que ce soit pour un taxi Antibes, un transfert longue distance ou un trajet local.

Avec Trip Riviera, chaque déplacement devient une expérience unique : service sur mesure, itinéraire optimisé et flexibilité totale.

 Contactez Trip Riviera dès aujourd’hui pour réserver votre taxi Antibes, chauffeur privé VTC ou transfert aéroport. Nous transformons vos trajets en moments d’exception sur la Côte d’Azur.

Name: DMC-Limousines | Destination Management Concierge
Description:
For over 39 years, DMC Limousines has stood for something very simple, yet increasingly rare: 𝐞𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞. Founded and led by Richard de Krijger, our company has become a trusted partner for executives, diplomats, and high-level decision makers who demand more than just a ride. They expect peace of mind, absolute discretion, and seamless professionalism.

We specialize in  𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡-𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐱𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐕𝐈𝐏 𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝. From private airport transfers at Amsterdam Schiphol, to full-day roadshows and international itineraries, our services are designed for those who value comfort, efficiency, and trust. Every journey is handled with care and discretion by our in-house chauffeurs. Certified professionals trained in etiquette, defensive driving, and privacy protocols.

What sets us apart is not just our fleet of over 50 Mercedes executive vehicles, but the people behind the wheel. Unlike services that rely on freelancers, our chauffeurs are part of our team. They know your preferences, they understand the importance of timing and tone, and they are committed to representing your standards as well as ours. Many are Bruseco D1 and D2 certified, an industry rarity that reflects our emphasis on quality and safety.

We go beyond transportation logistics. Our 𝐝𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐢𝐬 𝐚𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 24/7, proactively monitoring every ride in real time. From delayed flights to last-minute schedule changes, we respond instantly. Often before you even call.

We also provide clients with access to a 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫-𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐲 𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐥 for planning, status updates, invoicing, and historical overviews. You’ll never wait for confirmation or wonder if things are on track.

“𝒀𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒓𝒊𝒅𝒆 𝒎𝒖𝒔𝒕 𝒃𝒆 𝒂 𝒋𝒐𝒖𝒓𝒏𝒆𝒚.”
That’s not just our motto. It’s our commitment.

 www.dmc-limousines.com

Name: MOVVO
Description:
MOVVO is a private hire operator based in London, providing transportation services to customers in and around the city. Our main services offered by MOVVO include airport transfers, corporate travel, and special events transportation. The company specializes in providing transportation solutions to both individual and corporate clients, offering a range of vehicles to suit different needs and budgets.
One of the key services provided by MOVVO is airport transfers. The company offers a seamless and stress-free transportation service to and from all major airports in London, including Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and City airport. With a team of experienced drivers and a fleet of well-maintained vehicles, customers can be assured of a comfortable and efficient journey to their destination.

Corporate travel is another important service offered by MOVVO The company works closely with businesses of all sizes, providing bespoke transportation solutions that meet the needs of their clients. Whether it is transporting executives to and from meetings or providing transportation for conferences and events, MOVVO offers a flexible and reliable service that is tailored to meet the specific requirements of each client.

In addition to airport transfers and corporate travel, MOVVO also provides transportation services for special events such as weddings, parties and other social occasions. The company offers a range of vehicles, including luxury cars and minibuses, to ensure that clients can travel in style and comfort on their special day.

Overall, MOVVO is a trusted and reliable private hire operator that offers a range of transportation services to customers in London. With a commitment to providing excellent customer service and a focus on safety and reliability, the company is well positioned to meet the needs of both individual and corporate clients.

Name: CSNERT - Chambre Syndicale Nationale des Entreprises de Remise et de Tourisme
Description:
Active depuis 1945, la CSNERT est la fédération professionnelle qui représente les entreprises de Voitures de Transport avec Chauffeur structurées : celles qui opèrent dans l’accueil haut de gamme, la mobilité corporate, l’événementiel et le tourisme d’excellence.

Dans un paysage souvent résumé aux plateformes, la CSNERT défend une autre réalité : des entreprises réglementées, formées, investies dans la qualité de service et engagées dans la montée en gamme de l’accueil en France.
Nous portons auprès de l’État la voix des opérateurs qui font vivre le prestige français : transferts VIP, mobilité protocolaire, grands événements internationaux, fashion weeks, salons professionnels, tournées corporate et services dédiés aux agences de voyage haut de gamme.

La CSNERT travaille avec les ministères, les parlementaires, les collectivités et Atout France pour :
• protéger l’identité du métier face aux dérives et à la confusion réglementaire ;
• structurer une signalétique et une classification lisible ;
• promouvoir le Label Qualité certifié, gage d’excellence pour la filière ;
• garantir un cadre juridique stable pour les entreprises et leurs chauffeurs ;
• soutenir le développement territorial des acteurs professionnels.

Nos adhérents bénéficient d’un accompagnement pratique (réglementation, social, fiscalité, exploitation), de ressources opérationnelles, d’un réseau national actif et d’une représentation continue auprès des institutions.

Parce que l’union fait la force, rejoindre la CSNERT permet à chaque entreprise de contribuer à la défense et à la valorisation d’un métier essentiel à l’image de la France et à l’expérience des visiteurs internationaux.

CSNERT – Chambre Syndicale Nationale des Entreprises de Remise et de Tourisme
Fédération Française des Voitures de Transport avec Chauffeur
France Limousine Association
www.csnert.fr

Name: Tokyo MK
Description:
We started our business in 1997 with 84 vehicles, and now, with the support of our customers, we have 271 vehicles in the luxury transportation business.

We have been committed to ensuring customer satisfaction since the beginning. Creating our own processes and standards for our drivers, educating our employees on exceptional customer service as well as safety. In the early 2000's, we introduced wagon-type cabs that can accommodate many passengers and luggage, which are now widely seen in Tokyo, and we also own more than 60 ultra-luxury vehicles such as Lexus, Mercedes Benz, and BMW. These innovative management strategies have gained us a great reputation among our customers.

In order to achieve the goal of switching all of our vehicles to EVs by 2025, we will make a company-wide effort to promote EVs to realize a sustainable society and further reduce the impact on the environment.

We believe that our mission is to increase employee satisfaction (ES) and continue to pursue the "customer first policy” that Sadao Aoki, our founder, established, and we will continue to work hard.

Although we are currently in the midst of the COVID-19 and are facing a difficult situation that we have never experienced before, we will fulfill our mission as a public transportation company, protect the lives of our employees, and take steps toward a bright future that will come again one day.

We hope that you will continue to support Tokyo MK and the MK Group.

Kiyomi Matsubara, Representative Director, Tokyo MK.

Crafting an itinerary involves myriad details, all of which are seamlessly managed by Ru Viaggi. Prioritize Safety and Maintain Confidentiality
Bid farewell to the days of scrutinizing Uber license plates or sprinting to hail a taxi for your daily cardio.

With Ru-viaggi Limousine Service, you won’t have to second-guess the vehicle you’re stepping into. We’ve already confirmed its location for you 30 minutes ahead of time.

Don’t compromise on your standards. Discreet travel isn’t exclusive to private aviation. Maintain the privacy of your conversations on the ground by entrusting our extensively trained chauffeurs, who understand the importance of keeping highly sensitive discussions strictly confidential.


Globally at Your Service
We’ve all experienced the stress of organizing reservations for an international trip. Amidst coordinating hotels, flights, and trains, securing an automobile might not initially seem like a major concern… until you realize you’ll be communicating with around 30 individuals just to book transportation for each segment of the journey.

This is where we step in. Provide us with the itinerary. We’ll serve as your sole point of contact, available 24/7/365 throughout the entire trip, ensuring your safety until you return home safely.

Name: Oslo Taxi AS
Description:
Oslo Taxi er i dag Norges største drosjesentral og Norges fjerde største foretak innen persontransport målt i antall passasjerer. Selskapet transporterer årlig over 7 millioner kunder og har tilknyttet ca. 2600 sjåfører. Oslo Taxi driver ordinær drosjetransport samt utfører faste oppdrag og kontraktskjøring av skolebarn, funksjonshemmede, rullestolbrukere, pasienter og pleietrengende til legevakt og sykehus.

I Oslo Taxi har vi en visjon om at vi har plass til alle. Det betyr at vi tar vårt samfunnsoppdrag på alvor og skal være en viktig del av kollektivtransporten. Vi skal levere taxitjenester etter verdiene likeverd, effektivitet og redelighet.

I tillegg til sjåfører og eiere har administrasjonen gjennomsnittlig 82 årsverk.

Name: Grin Mobility

**Grin Mobility: Your Future is in Your Hands**

At Grin Mobility, we are revolutionizing urban transportation by providing 100% electric car leases to drivers, offering a sustainable, cost-effective, and premium solution for urban commuting. Our mission is to create eco-friendly mobility options that reduce carbon emissions and enhance the quality of urban life.

- **Electric Car Leasing:** We provide affordable and reliable electric vehicles on lease, making eco-friendly transportation accessible to middle-class drivers.
- **Zero Emissions:** Our fleet of electric cars helps reduce urban pollution, contributing to cleaner, greener cities.
- **Reliable Service:** We ensure zero driver cancellations and transparent pricing, offering a dependable and premium experience for our riders.
- **Technology-Driven:** Our innovative solutions include a user-friendly mobile app and website, making it easy for drivers and riders to connect and enjoy our services.

### Our Vision:
To lead the charge in sustainable urban mobility, empowering drivers and riders to make environmentally conscious choices without compromising on quality or affordability.

### Join Us:
Grin Mobility is not just about transportation; it's about creating a movement towards a sustainable future. Whether you are a driver looking for a reliable lease option, a customer seeking premium rides, or an investor passionate about green technology, we invite you to join us in transforming urban mobility.

### Contact Us:
Visit our website at [www.grinmobility.com](http://www.grinmobility.com) or follow us on social media to learn more about our services and how you can be part of the Grin Mobility journey.

#EVmobility #SustainableTransportation #ElectricVehicles #UrbanMobility #GrinMobility #CleanEnergy #FutureTransport

Name: RYDX
Description:
Rydx is an early-stage urban mobility initiative focused on simplifying short-distance travel in Indian cities.
In dense urban areas, everyday trips of 2–5 km are often the most difficult expensive, slow, and unreliable. Rydx is being built to address this gap through a simple, hyperlocal approach to bike, auto, and cab coordination.
Rather than starting with heavy technology, Rydx is currently in the validation phase, beginning with small, controlled pilots to understand real commuter needs, driver participation, safety concerns, and operational challenges. This bottom-up approach helps ensure that any future product is built on practical insights and responsible execution.
Rydx aims to create:
Faster and more affordable everyday rides
Transparent and fair earning opportunities for drivers
A simple, clutter-free user experience
A responsible and scalable mobility model for Indian cities
Starting in New Delhi, Rydx is exploring partnerships, incubation support, and mentorship to build a sustainable urban mobility solution rooted in real-world use cases.

Name: Department of For-Hire Vehicles
Description:
DFHV regulates the For-Hire Industry in the District of Columbia. 

Mission:

The mission of the Department of For-Hire Vehicles (DFHV) is to protect public interest by regulating the vehicle-for-hire industry to allow the citizens and visitors of the District of Columbia to have safe, affordable, and accessible transportation options.

Summary of Service:

The Department of For-Hire Vehicles provides licensing, adjudication, enforcement, and Lost and Found service for approximately 8,500 drivers, over 90 taxicab companies/associations, and over 600 of limousine operators, as well as DC residents and visitors who use public and private vehicle-for-hire in District of Columbia.

New Name/Expanded Responsibilities:

The newly reorganized Department of For-Hire Vehicles is now aligned with the mission to regulate the vehicle-for-hire industry to allow the citizens and visitors of the District of Columbia to have safe, affordable and accessible transportation. Agency duties include regulating taxis, limousines, private vehicle operators, digital dispatch services, Payment Service Providers; and managing the relationships with equipment manufacturers and insurance companies. The office is restructured as follows: Office of the Director; Compliance & Enforcement; Regulatory Policy & Planning; Client Services; and Hearings & Conflict Resolution. The For-Hire Vehicle Advisory Council will advise the agency on the industry.

Name: Magical Taxi Tour
Description:
..."A Once in a Lifetime Trip which they will never forget"...

One of London's most unique charity events takes place each year when a convoy of licensed London taxis take over 200 children, suffering from a range of chronic debilitating illnesses and life limiting conditions, on a three-day trip of a lifetime to Disneyland Resort Paris. This Magical Taxi Tour has bought moments of great joy and happiness to sick children. You can read about Danielle who was one of them on this website.

This amazing convoy, can be over three miles long when running and consists of 90 plus taxis, City of London Police escorts, Gendarmerie Nationale, London Ambulance NHS Trust vehicles and AA breakdown trucks

Organised annually, by the Worshipful Company of Hackney Carriage Drivers, this event is only possible with the help of our sponsors who generously give toward the £1,600 per taxi necessary to meet the expenses of hotel, fuel, food, admission charges etc. The taxi drivers naturally give freely of their time and use of their vehicles. We are filled with sadness that some of these youngsters have since died, but with your help we are determined to give more children this once in a lifetime opportunity.

Description:
LSA Transports – Transport sur mesure depuis 1985

Depuis 1985, l'entreprise familiale LSA Transports - Lesaffre Service Assistance, basée Montfort sur Meu près de Rennes, est un acteur de référence dans le transport de personnes en Pays de Brocéliande, en Bretagne et pour des déplacements partout en France avec plus de 25 000 missions assurées chaque année.
Spécialisée dans une large gamme de service, notre mission est de vous offrir des trajets sûrs, confortables et adaptés à vos besoins spécifiques.

Que vous ayez besoin d’un taxi classique, d’un taxi TPMR pour les personnes à mobilité réduite, ou d’un taxi conventionné pour vos rendez-vous médicaux, nous avons la solution qui vous correspond. Nous assurons également le transport scolaire adapté pour enfants en situation de handicap, ainsi que des navettes aéroports vers Rennes, Nantes et Paris pour vos déplacements professionnels ou personnels.

Pour vos déplacements en groupe, nous mettons à votre disposition des minivans jusqu’à 8 personnes et des minicars haut de gamme premium jusqu’à 16 personnes, avec un service de qualité supérieure pour vos voyages d’affaires ou vos événements.

En tant qu'entreprise soucieuse de l'environnement, nous avons également intégré des véhicules électriques et hybrides dans notre flotte, afin de réduire notre empreinte carbone tout en offrant à nos clients des options de transport plus écologiques.

Avec une équipe de chauffeurs professionnels, bienveillants et un parc de véhicules modernes, nous nous engageons à offrir un service personnalisé, ponctuel et de confiance. Chez Lesaffre Service Assistance LSA Transports, nous plaçons votre confort, votre sécurité et votre satisfaction au cœur de notre métier.

Name: Telemark Taxi AS
Description:
Telemark Taxi AS – et selskap eiet av drosjenæringen i Telemark som tilbyr tjenester på et selvstendig grunnlag til drosjenæringen primært, men også til andre som har behov for logistikk og annet relatert til persontransport og/eller personalhåndtering. Vårt produktspekter er bredt – ta kontakt så “syr” vi et tilbud til deg. Husk det er bare din fantasi som setter begrensingene!

TTT tilbyr deg det du har behov for. Vår oppgave er å levere deg tjenester som bidrar til at du kan redusere dine kostnader.

Basis er Finn Frogne’s system, både taksameter og “back-office” system, men benytter du andre systemer, la ikke det være en hindring. Løsningene er der, så ta gjerne kontakt for en nærmere dialog. Pr. i dag håndterer selskapet også TDS og CenCom – kunder.

Investering i taksameterssytem er ikke “bare” utstyret i bilen.
Like mye er det investering i baksystemer som skal gi deg konkurransefortrinn også i morgen. Sikre at du kan levere det dine kunder forventer og møte de krav de stiller. Derfor er baksystemet like viktig om ikke mer enn selve enheten i bilen. Gjennom våre konsepter sikrer vi deg dette, samtidig som vi bidrar til din kostnadsreduksjon i hverdagen.

Name: Class Travel
Description:
We are Shropshire’s leading private hire taxi company specialising in providing long distance travel services, seaport and airport transfers. We pride ourselves on providing transport for clients across Shropshire, Telford and Powys, with a first-class service based on punctuality and professionalism with a mixed fleet of vehicles including saloons, estates, MPVs and Minibus taxis. Some of the most frequent areas that we receive bookings for, are Shrewsbury, Telford, Oswestry, Ellesmere, Whitchurch, Market Drayton, Shawbury, Wem, Church Stretton, Craven Arms, Ludlow, Much Wenlock, Newport, Bridgnorth and surrounding areas.

Some of the most popular airport destinations are, Heathrow Airport, Manchester Airport, Liverpool Airport, Birmingham Airport and East Midlands Airport. We frequently transport clients to and from seaports including Southampton, Holyhead, Dover, Portsmouth, Liverpool and Tilbury. We can transport you to any destination in the UK with our most popular destinations being Central London, multiple cities in the North West, and the Lake District, to name a few. We have also provided transport as far as Scotland, on several occasions.

All our drivers are Shropshire based, with an excellent knowledge of the local area and national road infrastructure. Our drivers are professional and courteous, and are fully licenced with Shropshire Council. As part of that process they have undergone enhanced DBS checks and have completed safeguarding training. Our drivers use live navigation systems to avoid major delays on motorways where possible.

If your travel regularly for business, you will be happy to hear that we also offer accounts for businesses that require regular long distance and airport transfers. We provide transport for multiple businesses in Shropshire and Telford. Opening an account with us comes with benefits such as weekly or monthly billing which can help your business cash flow.

Our limousine service can take you downtown, to Park Circle or to and from a show at one of the many concerts venues located all over the city. Are you here for a golf trip? * Grab the Nearest Car: Simply open the app and find a nearby Gojo Car that can get you to your destination.
* Upfront Fixed Fares: Never wonder what your taxi is going to cost you again. Check out the fare right in the app.
* Affordable Everyday Pricing: Enjoy access to affordable, everyday pricing in our cars, Minibuses, or luxury cars. Ride alone or with a group.

* Airport Pickup: Landing at the airport? Why wait for a taxi when you can pre-schedule your airport ride?
* Book Now or Book Later: Whatever fits your schedule that day!
* Delivery: Contactless, door-to-door delivery made fast and easy. We’ll be launching this soon!
* Car of Your Choice: Book a car of your choosing so you can ride in style to your destination.

Choose a Car Rental Company:
Start by researching and selecting a reputable car rental company. You can find numerous options both online and at physical locations. Popular car rental companies include Hertz, Enterprise, Avis, Budget, and many local providers.

Reservation:
Once you've chosen a rental company, visit their website or contact them directly to make a reservation. You will need to provide information such as your name, contact details, rental dates, and the type of car you want.

Driver's License and Age Requirement:
To rent a car, you typically need a valid driver's license. Be aware that the age requirement varies by location and rental company. In many places, the minimum age is 21, but drivers under 25 may be subject to additional fees.

Insurance:
Car rental companies usually offer insurance options, including collision damage waiver (CDW), liability coverage, and personal accident insurance. You can choose to purchase insurance from the rental company or use your own insurance if it covers rental cars.

OUR STORY

Executive Transport is a family-run business, founded by Ray Mifsud and has been tending to clients and exceeding expectations since the early 2000s.
Ray Mifsud, who is now in his 50s, knows humble beginnings since he started the company with just one vehicle.

Co-founder Yvonne Mifsud is Raymond and Ryan’s right hand. She was instrumental in the founding and growth of this popular chauffeur service. Yvonne still manages business operations today. Fast-forward a few years, Executive Transport achieved significant growth and holds approximately 20 vehicles and counting.

At a very young age, his son, Ryan Mifsud showed interest and was keen on the transportation and chauffeur service industry. Now in his late 20s, Ryan is running the Operations of the company.

With SAFAR, passengers can book verified drivers through our Mobile App, Call Center, WhatsApp, or Web Portal — anytime, anywhere. Our system ensures 100% driver verification, live ride tracking, and guaranteed rides that never get canceled after confirmation. Every journey is monitored by a dedicated SAFAR Captain, who contacts the passenger during the ride for support and safety.

We’re not just a ride-sharing platform — we’re building a community-driven ecosystem that empowers both passengers and drivers. SAFAR is designed to serve individuals, families, tourists, and businesses with reliable point-to-point mobility across Bangladesh.

As Bangladesh moves toward a digital transport revolution, SAFAR is at the forefront — combining technology, trust, and transparency to shape the future of travel.

Ride smart. Ride safe. Ride SAFAR.

Optimisez votre temps en travaillant dans votre propre voiture durant le trajet de 30-40 minutes qui vous mènent au bureau.. 
Avec Konzam, Offrez-vous la meilleure place dans votre propre voiture.

Name: Ezel Korsan Taksi
Description:
İstanbul Korsan Taksi
Bizim için müşteri memnuniyeti her şeyden önemlidir. Firmamız olarak, sizlere en iyi hizmeti sunmak ve beklentilerinizi karşılamak için çalışıyoruz. Sizlere en iyi hizmeti sunabilmek için geri dönütlerinizi dikkate alıyor ve sürekli olarak kendimizi geliştiriyoruz.

Neden bizi tercih etmelisiniz?

Hızlı korsan: Korsan taksi hizmetimiz, her zaman en hızlı ve güvenilir şekilde hizmet sunmayı hedefler. Uzman şoförlerimiz, trafik durumunu takip ederek en uygun rotaları seçer ve sizi istediğiniz yere zamanında ulaştırır.

24/7 Acil Hizmet: İhtiyaç anında bize ulaşabilirsiniz. Acil durumlarınızda size yardımcı olacak profesyonel bir ekibimiz her zaman hazır. Gecenin her saati, tatil günlerinde ve hafta sonlarında da hizmetinizdeyiz.

Konforlu ve Güvenli Araçlar: Korsan taksi filomuzda bulunan araçlar, konforlu ve güvenli bir seyahat deneyimi sağlamak üzere özenle seçilmiştir. Yüksek standartlara uygun olarak bakımları yapılan araçlarımızla seyahat etmenin rahatlığını yaşayın.

Hizmetlerimiz

Havalimanı Transferleri: Hızlı ve güvenli bir şekilde havalimanına ulaşmak için bize güvenebilirsiniz. Uzman şoförlerimiz, uçuş saatlerinizi takip ederek sizi zamanında havalimanına ulaştırır veya havaalanından alır.

Şehir İçi Ulaşım: Şehir içinde yapmanız gereken acil bir işiniz mi var? Acil Korsan Taksi, en optimal rotayı seçerek sizi hedefinize götürür. Trafik yoğunluğu veya yol durumu ne olursa olsun, biz sizi düşünüyoruz.

Gece Gezileri ve Eğlenceler: Bir partiye veya gece eğlencesine mi katılacaksınız? Endişelenmeyin, sizin için vaktinde gelir ve sizi güvenli bir şekilde evinize geri götürürüz. Biz, gece eğlencesinin keyfini çıkarmanız için buradayız.

İstanbul Korsan Taksi olarak müşterilerimize güvenli, hızlı ve kaliteli bir hizmet sunmak en büyük hedefimizdir. Sizi memnun etmek ve ihtiyaçlarınıza en iyi şekilde yanıt vermek için buradayız. Bizimle iletişime geçmek ve hizmetlerimizi denemek için hemen rezervasyon yapın veya sorularınız için bize ulaşın.

Name: Charlie Cabs Limited
Description:
At Charlie Cabs, we believe that a great taxi service is built on three things: trust, reliability, and community. Proudly based in Taunton, Somerset, we are more than just a taxi company — we are a local service dedicated to keeping people connected, businesses moving, and our community on the go.

As a locally owned and operated business, we understand the needs of Taunton’s residents, visitors, and businesses. From the morning school run to the late-night journey home, from quick trips across town to longer journeys across Somerset, our mission is simple: to provide a service that is safe, dependable, and customer-focused every single time.

What sets Charlie Cabs apart is our commitment to innovation and collaboration. Through the use of Autocab technology, we’ve streamlined the way customers book, track, and complete journeys. This not only ensures faster response times and more efficient dispatching, but also gives passengers confidence in knowing exactly where their driver is and when they will arrive.

In addition, we collaborate closely with our sister company, Taunton Taxi Services, to exchange work and maximise coverage. This partnership means that passengers benefit from a larger, combined fleet — giving Taunton the fastest, most reliable taxi service in the area. It’s not about competing with one another; it’s about raising the standard of service for the community we both serve.

Our drivers are at the heart of everything we do. Each one is fully licensed, vetted, and committed to delivering a professional yet friendly experience. We take pride in being approachable, dependable, and ready to go the extra mile (literally) for our customers.

For us, success isn’t measured in miles driven — it’s measured in trust earned. That’s why Charlie Cabs is more than just transport; we’re the local taxi company you can count on.

Name: Green Cabs
Description:
An exciting new way to travel sustainably so that our customers can not only go easy from A to B but go easy on the planet too.

We think New Zealand is the best place in the world and we want to help protect it. The transportation sector plays a crucial role in responding to climate change, as almost 20% of New Zealand’s domestic greenhouse gas emissions are generated by transportation. Therefore, it’s essential to reduce these emissions to protect the wellbeing of New Zealand and its people. Our goal is to speed up New Zealand’s transition to an electric-powered future.

Our drivers share our passion for this mission, which is why they are an integral part of our team. By driving electric vehicles, they not only make their own contribution to a greener world but also inspire their passengers to do the same. We’ve surrounded ourselves with great, like-minded people who are enthusiastic about the future and proud to play their part in this effort.

Join us on this exciting journey and book your next ride today. Simply book using our online booking platform or call our team on 0800 767 673.

Name: Stardust Charters
Description:
Stardust Charters is a family-owned chauffeur service dedicated to providing reliable and eco-friendly transportation solutions throughout Perth and southwest WA. We take pride in our commitment to affordability and punctuality, delivered with the luxury and safety of our all-Tesla electric fleet.

Our Mission

At Stardust Charters, sustainability isn’t merely a policy—it’s our driving force. We’re committed to reducing our environmental impact in every aspect of our operations. Our vehicles are primarily recharged using direct solar charging or renewable-offset rapid chargers, ensuring that your journey with us is as clean as it is comfortable.

Our Fleet

Our fleet of 3 Tesla electric vehicles includes:

Model Y ‘Ruby’ - Added to our family in 2022
Model X ‘Snow White’ - Our luxury flagship, joined in 2023
Model Y ‘Frosty’ - The newest addition to our fleet, also from 2023

Our Story

In 2021, Garry took the first step towards a cleaner and more sustainable future by investing in ‘Pearl’, our Tesla Model 3. Our Promise

Punctual Service, Guaranteed. Fully insured in ultra-safe vehicles. With each trip you take with Stardust Charters, you are making a tangible difference by reducing your reliance on fossil-fuelled vehicles. Join us in our mission to create a greener, more sustainable future, one journey at a time.

Name: CTaxi Gdańsk
Description:
W CTaxi Gdańsk kładziemy nacisk na dostarczanie nie tylko komfortowych, ale przede wszystkim bezpiecznych usług taxi, spełniających oczekiwania zarówno klientów indywidualnych, jak i biznesowych. Nasza firma to więcej niż zwykłe taksówki - to gwarancja szybkiego i bezpiecznego przemieszczania się po Gdańsku i okolicach.

Dla klientów biznesowych przygotowaliśmy specjalną ofertę, obejmującą elastyczne rozwiązania dostosowane do potrzeb korporacyjnych. Zapewnimy punktualne transfery na lotniska, dworce czy spotkania biznesowe, umożliwiając płatności gotówkowe, kartą czy fakturą - wszystko, aby ułatwić i usprawnić korzystanie z naszych usług.

Jesteśmy partnerem nie tylko w codziennych podróżach, ale również w obszarze imprez masowych. Organizując duże wydarzenia, możesz polegać na naszej sprawdzonej flocie, doświadczonych kierowcach oraz elastyczności dostosowania się do specyfiki każdego eventu. Gwarantujemy bezpieczeństwo i efektywność obsługi.

Nasza flota pojazdów to nie tylko środki transportu, ale ruchome oazy komfortu i bezpieczeństwa. Dbamy o nasze samochody, by były zawsze w doskonałej kondycji, a nasi kierowcy przechodzą rygorystyczne szkolenia z zakresu bezpieczeństwa drogowego. Bezpieczeństwo pasażerów to dla nas priorytet.

CTaxi Gdańsk to nie tylko firma transportowa. Jesteśmy częścią społeczności lokalnej, angażując się w różne inicjatywy i wydarzenia. Naszym celem jest nie tylko dostarczanie usług transportowych, ale również tworzenie pozytywnego wpływu na życie społeczności, w której działamy.

Cabo on kotimainen, uusinta mobiiliteknologiaa hyödyntävä ja täysin uudenlaista toimintamallia toteuttava kyytienvälitysjärjestelmä. Cabon toiminta-alueena on tällä hetkellä Joensuu, Lahti ja olemme laajentamassa Jyväskylään.

Toimintamme lähtökohtana on tarjota alueesta riippumatta aina halvin taksikyyti, laadusta tinkimättä. Edulliset taksikyydit on mahdollista toteuttaa uuden ajan mobiiliteknologiaa hyödyntämällä sekä optimoimalla kuljetuskaluston käyttöaste. Järjestelmä tarjoaa myös erilaisia ratkaisumalleja maaseudun ja pienten paikkakuntien taksitoiminnan organisoimiselle.

Cabolla kuljettajat saavat itse valita ajomääränsä. Tällainen toimintamalli tarjoaa jokaiselle mahdollisuuden työskennellä taksinkuljettajana oman aikataulun ja tarpeen mukaan. Taksinkuljettajan työ sopii kaikille, jotka viihtyvät auton ratissa ja jotka haluavat saada lisäansiota tai hakevat vaihtelua arkeen tai opiskeluun.

Cabo ei katso taustapeiliin ja haaveile menneistä "hyvistä" ajoista, vaan katse on tuulilasissa ja 2020-luvussa. Ihmiset on luotu kulkemaan ja tavara liikkumaan. Näitä tarpeita hoitamaan syntyi Cabo.

Name: Sapphire Drive - VIP Transport & Limousine Service
Description:
Luksusowy transport dla wymagających klientów biznesowych

W świecie, gdzie liczy się czas, profesjonalizm i najwyższy standard obsługi, kluczowe znaczenie ma wybór odpowiedniego partnera transportowego. Zapewniamy usługi przewozowe na najwyższym poziomie, dedykowane przedstawicielom biznesu, dyplomatom oraz klientom oczekującym niezawodności, komfortu i pełnej dyskrecji.

Nasza oferta została stworzona z myślą o osobach, które cenią sobie efektywność i prestiż w podróży. Doświadczeni kierowcy, flota luksusowych pojazdów oraz indywidualne podejście do każdego zlecenia sprawiają, że każdy przejazd jest płynny, bezpieczny i dostosowany do najwyższych standardów.

● Wynajem samochodu z kierowcą – ekskluzywny transport dostosowany do Twojego harmonogramu, zapewniający pełną wygodę i dyskrecję.
● Transfery lotniskowe – punktualny i bezproblemowy transport na lotnisko oraz odbiór po przylocie, eliminujący wszelkie niedogodności związane z podróżą.
● Prywatny kierowca – indywidualna obsługa, dostosowana do dynamicznego trybu życia i wymagań biznesowych.
● Kurier VIP – ekspresowe i bezpieczne dostarczanie poufnych dokumentów oraz przesyłek, gwarantujące pełną poufność i niezawodność.

Zapewniamy nie tylko transport, ale także spokój i pewność, że każda podróż odbędzie się zgodnie z najwyższymi standardami. Współpraca z nami to gwarancja profesjonalizmu, dyskrecji i elastyczności dostosowanej do potrzeb najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Name: Vestfold taxi-line
Description:
Vestfold Taxi-Line har tilbudt kunder hovedsakelig ved Torp Airport, i Sandefjord, Tønsberg og området rundt (Vestfold) kvalitetstransporttjenester siden 2021 med god taxiservice fra sjåfører med lang erfaring.

Dette har alltid vært grunnen til at vi legger så mye vekt på å velge de beste sjåførene/eierne til å bli med i teamet vårt.

Du vil alltid ha en sjåfør som kan punktlighet, trygg kjøring og kundeservice ut og inn. Vi tar sikte på å ikke bare møte dine behov, men også overgå dine forventninger til hva en taxitjeneste kan være.

Samt kan vi tilby våre kunder fastpris på taxituren hvor enn man skal. Skjekk våre fastpriser som gjelder Torp flyplassen!

I tillegg til tradisjonelle drosjer med 4 passasjerseter, kan vi til by maxitaxi fra 5 til 16 personer, men slike reiser bør avtales på forhånd minst to timer før avreise.

Spesielle bestillinger slik som dyr i taxi (Hund i taxi, Katt i taxi og andre kjæledyr i taxi), eller spedbarn i taxi (taxi med barnesete) kan avtales.

Vi kan godt kjøre andre ting i taxi slik som matposer, datamaskiner og internpost, eller hvis du har noe du trenger å komme deg fra et sted til et annet uten å ha muligheten til å kjøre det selv.

Vi kan tilby samkjøring også (så lenge begge parter er enige) Dette vil hjelpe våre kunder å spare og å slippe å betale fullpris.

Joyride Taxi Services | Nagpur & Wardha's Trusted Transportation Solution

At Joyride Taxi Services, we specialize in offering reliable, efficient, and customer-centric taxi services across Nagpur and Wardha. Whether it's a daily commute, point-to-point city rides, or long-distance travel, we cater to a wide range of travel needs with our modern fleet of vehicles and professional drivers.

City Ride: A convenient and affordable point-to-point taxi service for regular commuters and daily routines. Available in both AC Sedans and AC SUVs for a comfortable journey.

Customer-Centric Policies: We operate with a no-cancellation policy, ensuring customers are never inconvenienced. Our drivers are given fair working conditions, such as Sundays off, or compensated if called to work on these days.

With a strong focus on customer satisfaction, Joyride Taxi Services has become a preferred choice for both personal and corporate travel in Nagpur and Wardha. We are committed to enhancing the travel experience.

Name: TTO Taxi
Description:
TTO Taxi verzorgt al sinds oktober 1999 taxi-vervoer. Oprichter Kenneth Treebusch deed straatwerk en contractvervoer. Contractvervoer werd steeds meer het belangrijkste deel van het werk, dit omvatte leerlingenvervoer en crewchanges.
Na zijn overlijden in 2010 nam zijn vrouw Bep de leiding in handen. Momenteel rijdt TTO met 1 Skoda Superb Combi en  een VW Transporter met 9 zitplaatsen allerlei vervoer voor diverse opdrachtgevers. Van Rotterdam tot Schiphol, Antwerpen, en van Schiphol naar Duitsland. Grote groepen of een enkel bemanningslid. We gaan daar waar de klant ons stuurt.

We rijden zoveel mogelijk naar de wens van de klant en gaan vaak zelf een stapje verder dan gevraagd. We verzorgen de benodigde afhandeling bij diverse immigratiekantoren waarbij direct contact met de opdrachtgever vaak gewenst is. Directe lijnen tussen chauffeur en opdrachtgever is ons streven, om de wachttijden en dus onkosten zo beperkt mogelijk te houden. Ook hanteren wij voor de meest voorkomende ritten vaste prijzen, waardoor de opdrachtgever gevrijwaard blijft van onverwachte (on)kosten.
We beschikken in elke auto over mobiel internet (ook in Duitsland) waardoor verrassingen vaak uitblijven. We kunnen zien waar een schip zich bevindt, adressen en telefoonnummers opzoeken, vluchten checken op bijna elke luchthaven in Europa. Aansluitingen via het spoor zijn onderweg uit te zoeken.
Het belangrijkste is tenslotte de in de taxi aanwezige passagier, die op tijd op zijn bestemming moet zijn.


"It's our drive to serve you"

Name: Taxi 1 as
Description:
Taxi 1 er i dag en regional taxileverandør i Norge.  

Taxi 1 har drosjer i følgende fylker: Vestland, Rogaland, Agder, Viken, Trøndelag, Nordland samt Troms og Finnmark. 

Du treffer oss på tlf 05501, via app eller web. Du kan også velge oss fritt på holdeplassen selv om vi står sist i køen.
(Det er fritt taxivalg i Norge) 

Taxi 1 er en pådriver for å sikre at våre kjøretøy er nullutslippskjøretøy og nye biler som kjøpes inn er i hovedsak el-biler.

Taxi 1 har som første drosjesentral i Norge bygget et storskala ladeanlegg for drosjer i Bergen. Anlegget kan lade 50 kjøretøy parallelt. I tillegg har sentralen bygget et solcelleanlegg som gjør at drift og oppvarming gjøres med egenprodusert strøm. 

Taxi 1 har pr 21.12.2022 - 67 egne drosjeløyver i drift med ansatte sjåfører, i tillegg til ca. 100 tilsluttede løyvehavere i Norge.

Services Offerts aux Particuliers
Mon VTC propose une gamme complète de services spécialement conçus pour les particuliers :

Un chauffeur particulier se distingue par un ensemble de compétences spécifiques qui garantissent un service de haute qualité à ses clients. Un chauffeur particulier doit posséder une conduite irréprochable et une connaissance approfondie des itinéraires pour assurer des trajets rapides et confortables. La ponctualité et une présentation soignée sont également essentielles pour un chauffeur privé afin de maintenir une image professionnelle.

En plus de ses compétences de conduite, un chauffeur privé doit faire preuve de discrétion et de courtoisie. Un chauffeur particulier doit être capable de s'adapter aux préférences de ses passagers, qu'ils souhaitent discuter ou profiter du silence. Une bonne culture générale et la capacité de parler plusieurs langues peuvent également être des atouts précieux pour un chauffeur particulier, surtout lorsqu'il s'agit de clients internationaux.

Enfin, des compétences en sécurité rapprochée et une connaissance de base en mécanique sont souvent requises pour un chauffeur particulier afin d'assurer la sécurité et l'entretien du véhicule. Ces compétences permettent au chauffeur particulier de réagir efficacement en cas de problème technique ou de situation d'urgence.

Description:
S.A.Y Cars is based in Yealand, on the fringe of the Arnside & Silverdale AONB.

The business is based on a need identified by the owner, Paul Darlington, whose Mother spent her later years in Silverdale. Once Mrs. D had ceased driving and with decreasing personal mobility, expeditions outside the village, even to the railway station,  became quite a major production.

Paul’s been riding and driving these roads since the 1970’s, first as a founder member of the LRGS Cycling Club, then as a visitor and for the past couple of decades as a resident.

In semi-retirement after 30 years in the Courts and Legal system (professionally, not a ‘customer’), we’re happy to offer a Private Hire service both to the indigenous population and the area’s many visitors.

A life member of Headway, the charity for the victims of ABI and their carers, and following many years working with people who have sustained life changing injuries, we’ll always try to provide an empathetic service.

Name: Tara Taxi
Description:
Tara Taxi is reimagining local transport, with drivers, councils, and communities at its core.

We’re building a fairer, smarter platform that connects riders with trusted, council-approved taxi and private hire drivers. Our goal? To give power back to the people who keep cities moving.

Tara Taxi is designed to work with councils, not around them, offering full control over tariffs, compliance, and local regulation. Drivers benefit from better earnings, lower fees, and the opportunity to own a stake in the platform through a blockchain-based share system. Taxi firms get modern dispatch tools without giving up independence. And riders enjoy a safe, flexible, transparent experience, with real-time features and local familiarity.

We’re not just another app. We’re building something that strengthens the industry, not replaces it. No gimmicks. No shortcuts. Just a commitment to do better, together.

The name “Tara” came from a moment of deep intuition, it just felt right. Later research revealed two powerful meanings: Tara means rock in Irish, a symbol of strength and steadiness. And in Buddhist tradition, Tara is a goddess of compassion and protection. That dual meaning, grounded and spiritual, reflects what we stand for.

Tara Taxi is built to be solid, kind, and community-led, a reliable foundation for the future of local transport.
Fair. Friendly. Future-ready.

Le chauffeur privé joue un rôle crucial dans l’industrie des VTC (Voiture de Transport avec Chauffeur). En tant que professionnel du transport, il assure des services de qualité supérieure pour diverses catégories de clients.

Collaboration avec les industries : Le chauffeur privé travaille en étroite collaboration avec les entreprises et les industries. Ce chauffeur VTC premium assure des déplacements pour les cadres, les employés et les clients d’entreprises. La discrétion, la ponctualité et la connaissance des itinéraires sont des atouts précieux du chauffeur VTC.
Partenariat avec les agences de voyages : Les agences de voyages font souvent appel au chauffeur VTC pour leurs clients. Que ce soit pour des transferts aéroport, des visites touristiques ou des déplacements professionnels, le chauffeur VTC offre un service personnalisé et sécurisé.
Présence lors d’événements : Les organisateurs d’événements font confiance au chauffeur privé pour assurer le transport des invités. Que ce soit pour des mariages, des conférences, des galas ou des soirées spéciales, le chauffeur VTC veille au confort et à la sécurité des participants.
En résumé, les chauffeurs privés sont bien plus que des simples conducteurs. Le chauffeurs VTC premium est un partenaire essentiel pour les entreprises, les voyageurs et les organisateurs d’événements, garantissant des trajets agréables et de qualité.

Name: www.MyAirportDiary.co.uk
Description:
MAD Company page
Independent taxi operator online booking diary.
Here at MAD Security is important to us so we have added our upcoming security patches we will be rolling out in the very near future.
Extra opportunities to earn more are coming soon! 

Phase 1
- All event data is stored on your device and not MAD servers.
- Mad servers are used purely for user authentication
- there is no tracking and no use of cookies.
- The MAD app is fully GDPR Compliant.

Phase2
- Cloud sync will enable the ability to backup all event data.
- We will support End to End encryption - encrypting all data that is sent and received by your device this data is then unlocked on your device via the unique key setup when using biometrics or your unique PIN.

Phase 3
There are 2 approaches to sharing calendar data within teams.
Extra Secure
- A unique shared key is generated from the device which can be shared to other devices via NFC. This means users will only be able to access shared calendar data after tapping another physical device to share the key and accepting the key.
Less Secure
- A unique key can be shared that locks that data and can only be accessed with the Key - this key can be regenerated at any point by the user if it becomes compromised or you want to change which users can access the data.

Phase 4
- Companies can manage access to calendars via Device UID and remove and add access as and when needed.
